page_title: Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Original Soundtrack (2014HR Remaster Ver.)
text:
Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Original Soundtrack (2014HR Remaster Ver.) is the soundtrack remaster album to the film Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance, released on 05 November 2014. It was composed by Shirō Sagisu and published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number NOPA-500. https://musicbrainz.org/release/e24d7ccf-855b-4aa2-aebd-3b41e1d71bc9
